---
title: "Visualization & Communication"
description: "Publication-ready ggplot2, plotly, game trees, network graphs, dashboards."
listing:
  contents: "*/index.qmd"
  type: default
  sort: "date desc"
  categories: true
  fields: [title, description, date, categories]
---

::: {.topic-card-label}
45 TUTORIALS
:::

# Visualization & Communication

Publication-ready ggplot2, plotly, game trees, network graphs, dashboards.
